inputs.prompt: Task Router AI/automation work item and Architect AI integration constraints
inputs.context: Pipeline context including engine config, provider routing, telemetry, and performance goals

outputs.primary: AI system implementation plan or changes with verification evidence and integration notes
outputs.format: Outcome summary, impacted subsystems, metrics/logging plan, and validation results

failure_handling.on_model_drift: Enforce provider-agnostic behavior contracts; add validation and fallback paths
failure_handling.on_perf_issue: Profile and optimize hotspots; reduce routing/call overhead; preserve correctness
